Bash(ANON_KEY="REDACTED_OLD_ANON_KEY"
SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="REDACTED_OLD_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"
BASE="https://supabase.operscale.cloud/rest/v1"

echo "=== Projects ==="
curl -s "$BASE/projects?select=id,name,niche,status,created_at" -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "python3 json.tool failed"

echo ""
echo "=== Niche Profiles ==="
curl -s "$BASE/niche_profiles?select=id,project_id" -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"

echo ""
echo "=== Prompt Configs ==="
curl -s "$BASE/prompt_configs?select=id,project_id,prompt_type,is_active" -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"

echo ""
echo "=== Topics ==="
curl -s "$BASE/topics?select=id,project_id&limit=5" -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SERVICE_ROLE_KEY")

Bash(ANON_KEY="REDACTED_OLD_ANON_KEY"
PID="75eb2712-ef3e-47b7-b8db-5be3740233ff"

echo "Project status:"
curl -s "https://supabase.operscale.cloud/rest/v1/projects?id=eq.$PID&select=status" \\
  -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY"

echo ""
echo "Topics count:"
curl -s "https://supabase.operscale.cloud/rest/v1/topics?project_id=eq.$PID&select=id" \\
  -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>console.log\(JSON.parse\(d\).length\)\)")

Bash(source /c/Users/DELL/Documents/Antigravity/vision-gridai-platform/.env 2>/dev/null && curl -s "https://supabase.operscale.cloud/rest/v1/topics?id=eq.224cdff6-5ac2-48d4-b8cb-0eeea9cb878c&select=status,script_quality_score,word_count,scene_count,script_pass_scores,error_log,script_attempts,script_evaluation" -H "apikey: $SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || cat)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/c/Users/DELL/.claude/projects/C--Users-DELL-Documents-Antigravity-vision-gridai-platform/8ad4bfd7-2d41-4e80-90fe-8fddfa7a8ca2/tool-results/mcp-synta-mcp-n8n_manage_executions-1773143838311.txt'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
text = data[0]['text']
parsed = json.loads\(text\)
nodes = parsed.get\('data', {}\).get\('nodes', {}\)
for name in ['Check Pass 1 Error', 'IF Pass 1 Error', 'Collect Error']:
    if name in nodes:
        node = nodes[name]
        s = json.dumps\(node, indent=2\)
        if len\(s\) > 2000:
            s = s[:2000] + '...\(truncated\)'
        print\(f'=== {name} ==='\)
        print\(s\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOFPYTHON'
import json
with open\("C:\\\\Users\\\\DELL\\\\Documents\\\\Antigravity\\\\vision-gridai-platform\\\\workflows\\\\WF_WEBHOOK_PRODUCTION.json"\) as f:
    wf = json.load\(f\)
    
print\(f"Total nodes: {len\(wf['nodes']\)}\\n"\)
print\("Node list \(name → type\):"\)
for node in wf['nodes']:
    print\(f"  {node['name']:40s} → {node['type']}"\)
EOFPYTHON)
